item.description:
## whispermax v0.1.1
i wanted a fast local dictation app i could trust, so i built whispermax.
- in-app update support with a small home update pill - smarter insertion across more native apps, browsers, and editors - more honest pasted vs copied feedback - better clipboard behavior for fallback insertion - safer recorder failure cleanup - continued polish across onboarding, settings, and dictionary flows
notes: - automatic update checks are now on by default every 6 hours - the app is still not notarized, so macos may ask you to open it manually the first time
